nodes.title: OpenSpec: openspec-validation-history
nodes.description: Execution tracker for openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history. Adds Tauri commands to record and list OpenSpec validation results in Ruflo AgentDB memory, plus a ValidationHistory UI panel inside OpenSpecPanel.

nodes.title: 1.1: Create openspec_validate_history.rs with ValidationHistoryEntry type
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §1.1. Create `src-tauri/src/commands/openspec_validate_history.rs` exporting type `ValidationHistoryEntry { change_slug: String, valid: bool, errors: Vec<String>, ts_epoch: u64, ts_iso: String }` deriving `serde::Serialize`, `serde::Deserialize`, and `specta::Type`.

nodes.title: 1.2: Add build_history_key helper
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §1.2. In `openspec_validate_history.rs`, add helper `build_history_key(workspace: &WorkspaceContext, change_slug: &str, valid: bool, ts_ms: u128) -> String` producing the pipe-delimited key format defined in design.md §1.

nodes.title: 1.3: Add derive_workspace_for_path helper
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §1.3. Add helper `derive_workspace_for_path(project_path: &str) -> Result<WorkspaceContext, String>` that reuses the `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD` + basename logic already in `get_workspace_context` (factor a shared inner fn or call through the public command).

nodes.title: 2.1: Implement record_openspec_validation Tauri command
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §2.1. Implement `record_openspec_validation(project_path, change_slug, result_json, settings)` Tauri command. It MUST: (a) parse `result_json`; (b) derive `WorkspaceContext` via 1.3; (c) compute `ts_ms`; (d) build key via 1.2; (e) build JSON value; (f) call `run_ruflo_managed` with `["memory", "store", "-k", key, "-v", value]` and a 10s timeout; (g) return `()` on success.

nodes.title: 2.2: Implement list_openspec_validations Tauri command
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §2.2. Implement `list_openspec_validations(project_path, change_slug, settings) -> Result<Vec<ValidationHistoryEntry>, String>`. Must call `ruflo memory search`, parse results, filter by slug and type, JSON-parse each value, sort by `ts_epoch` descending, truncate to 50.

nodes.title: 2.3: Register module in commands/mod.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §2.3. Register both commands with `pub mod openspec_validate_history;` in `src-tauri/src/commands/mod.rs`.

nodes.title: 2.4: Register commands in lib.rs tauri handlers and specta collect
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §2.4. Register both commands in `src-tauri/src/lib.rs` in BOTH `tauri::generate_handler!` AND `tauri_specta::collect_commands!` alongside the existing `openspec::*` commands.

nodes.title: 3.1: Unit test for build_history_key
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §3.1. Unit test for `build_history_key`: assert exact pipe-delimited format including `outcome:pass` / `outcome:fail` and millisecond `ts:` segment.

nodes.title: 3.2: Unit test for record_openspec_validation JSON round-trip
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §3.2. Unit test that the JSON value emitted by `record_openspec_validation`'s formatter round-trips back through `serde_json::from_str::<ValidationHistoryEntry>(value)` — asserts `ts_epoch` is in seconds (not ms) and `ts_iso` parses as valid RFC-3339.

nodes.title: 3.3: Unit test for list_openspec_validations filter logic
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §3.3. Unit test for the `list_openspec_validations` filter: feed a synthetic search result containing one matching entry, one entry with the wrong slug, one entry with `type:trajectory`, and one entry whose value is malformed JSON. Assert only the matching entry survives.

nodes.title: 3.4: Unit test for list_openspec_validations sort order
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §3.4. Unit test for sort order: three entries with descending `ts_epoch` values produce a newest-first list.

nodes.title: 4.1: Regenerate src/bindings.ts via specta codegen
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §4.1. Regenerate `src/bindings.ts` by running the existing specta codegen step. The new type `ValidationHistoryEntry` and both new commands MUST appear in the output.

nodes.title: 4.2: Add recordOpenspecValidation and listOpenspecValidations wrappers in ipc.ts
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §4.2. Add wrappers in `src/ipc.ts`: `recordOpenspecValidation(projectPath, changeSlug, resultJson): Promise<void>` and `listOpenspecValidations(projectPath, changeSlug): Promise<ValidationHistoryEntry[]>`. Style matches the existing `runOpenspecValidate` and `getChangeBeadsProgress` wrappers.

nodes.title: 5.1: Add ruflo_version_probe TanStack Query to OpenSpecPanel
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §5.1. In `src/components/task-detail/OpenSpecPanel.tsx`, ensure a TanStack Query for `ruflo_version_probe` keyed `['ruflo-version']` with `staleTime: Infinity` and `retry: false` is present (or add it) to gate the history section.

nodes.title: 5.2: Modify ValidateSection.handleValidate to call recordOpenspecValidation
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §5.2. Modify `ValidateSection` so `handleValidate` calls `recordOpenspecValidation(projectRoot, changeName, JSON.stringify({ valid, errors }))` after both the success path and the catch path, then invalidates `['validation-history', projectRoot, changeName]`. Recording errors are caught and `console.warn`'d.

nodes.title: 5.3: Add ValidationHistory sub-component with TanStack Query
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §5.3. Add sub-component `<ValidationHistory projectRoot changeName />` inside `OpenSpecPanel.tsx`. Runs a TanStack Query against `listOpenspecValidations`, keyed `['validation-history', projectRoot, changeName]`, with `staleTime: 30_000` and `enabled` gated on the ruflo-version probe succeeding.

nodes.title: 5.4: Render history in <details> with count badge and 5-row table
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §5.4. Render the section inside a `<details>` (closed by default) with header "Validation history" and count badge. Render up to 5 rows newest-first. Each row: timestamp (HH:MM · DD MMM) + pass/fail badge + one-line summary. Wrap timestamp in `<Tooltip>` showing full ISO string (mirrors ArtifactLink).

nodes.title: 5.5: Implement per-row expansion for error list
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §5.5. Implement per-row expansion: click toggles a local `Set<number>` of expanded row indices. Expanded view renders the full `errors[]` list for `valid === false` entries, identical styling to the existing `ValidateSection` error list.

nodes.title: 5.6: Render empty state when query returns []
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §5.6. Render the empty state ("No validations recorded yet — click Re-validate above.") when the query returns `[]` and ruflo is available.

nodes.title: 5.7: Render gate message when ruflo_version_probe rejects
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §5.7. Render the gate message ("Validation history requires the ruflo CLI (memory store).") when `ruflo_version_probe` rejects.

nodes.title: 5.8: Render Show all footer when entries.length > 5
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §5.8. If `entries.length > 5`, render a "Showing 5 of N · [Show all]" footer where "Show all" toggles local state expanding the list inline (up to 50 entries, no modal, no new route).

nodes.title: 5.9: Insert <ValidationHistory> into OpenSpecPanelBody below ValidateSection
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §5.9. Insert `<ValidationHistory>` directly below `<ValidateSection>` in `OpenSpecPanelBody`.

nodes.title: 6.1: Vitest test — ValidationHistory empty state
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §6.1. Vitest / RTL test for `<ValidationHistory>`: mock `listOpenspecValidations` to return 0 entries → assert empty-state copy is rendered.

nodes.title: 6.2: Vitest test — ValidationHistory 3 entries newest-first, no Show all
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §6.2. Test with 3 entries → assert newest-first ordering and that no "Show all" footer renders.

nodes.title: 6.3: Vitest test — ValidationHistory 10 entries Show all toggle
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §6.3. Test with 10 entries → assert only 5 visible by default and that clicking "Show all" reveals the remainder.

nodes.title: 6.4: Vitest test — gate path renders gate message when ruflo unavailable
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §6.4. Test gate path: mock `ruflo_version_probe` rejection → assert gate message renders and no `listOpenspecValidations` call fires.

nodes.title: 6.5: Vitest test — recording side-effect calls recordOpenspecValidation
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §6.5. Test recording side-effect: mock `runOpenspecValidate` to return `{ valid: true, errors: [] }`, click Re-validate, assert `recordOpenspecValidation` is called once with the matching JSON payload.

nodes.title: 7.1: cargo test openspec_validate_history::tests passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §7.1. `cargo test -p beadspec_lib openspec_validate_history::tests` passes.

nodes.title: 7.2: bun tsc --noEmit passes after bindings regeneration
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §7.2. `bun tsc --noEmit` passes after bindings regeneration.

nodes.title: 7.3: bun run lint passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §7.3. `bun run lint` passes.

nodes.title: 7.4: Manual — validate Re-validate records two rows with correct badges
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §7.4. Manual: open a project with at least one OpenSpec change, open the change's epic task, expand OpenSpec, click Re-validate twice (once on a valid spec, once after introducing a spec error). Confirm two rows appear in "Validation history" with the correct badges; expand each to confirm the error list matches the inline ValidateSection result.

nodes.title: 7.5: Manual — uninstall ruflo and verify graceful degradation
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §7.5. Manual: uninstall (or rename) the `ruflo` binary; confirm the section degrades to the gate message and `Re-validate` still works in `ValidateSection` (record call fails silently and is logged to the console).

nodes.title: 7.6: Manual — switch worktrees and confirm history isolation
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §7.6. Manual: switch worktrees on the same repo; confirm history entries from worktree A do not appear in worktree B when the same change is opened.

nodes.title: 7.7: openspec validate openspec-validation-history passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/openspec-validation-history/tasks.md §7.7. `openspec validate openspec-validation-history` passes.
